Drone must stop if any obstacle is detected within 1 meters

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A drone sprays pesticide across fields while a ground rover monitors soil humidity. The drone must not spray if wind speed exceeds 25 km/h. The rover reports humidity every 10 minutes, and if humidity < 20%, the drone must pause spraying.

SoilRover reports humidity every 10 minutes
SprayDrone pauses spraying if humidity below 20%

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A UAV performs an inspection flight around a building. It must maintain a distance of at least 3 meters from any obstacle and return to the base after completing the inspection.

constraints: UAV must maintain a safe distance of 3 meters from obstacles
UAV must eventually return to base

wrong_samples.constraint: UAV must maintain a safe distance of 3 meters from obstacles
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A robotic arm assembles components while a vision robot checks alignment. The vision robot must verify after each assembly step. If misalignment > 2 mm, assembly halts until correction is confirmed.

constraints: VisionBot verifies alignment after each ArmBot assembly step
ArmBot stops if misalignment exceeds 2 mm
Assembly resumes after correction confirmation

wrong_samples.constraint: Assembly resumes after correction confirmation
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A loading robot stacks containers while a drone monitors alignment. The drone starts inspection after every 5 containers are stacked. If container tilt exceeds 3 degrees, stacking stops immediately.

LoaderBot stops stacking when tilt exceeds 3 degrees

wrong_samples.constraint: MonitorDrone inspects after every 5 containers stacked
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: Two sorting robots coordinate on a conveyor. If a package is misaligned, SorterA stops the belt while SorterB repositions it. Once corrected, both return to normal operation. Belt must not stop for more than 10 seconds.

constraints: SorterA stops conveyor when misalignment detected
SorterB corrects package alignment before resuming
SorterA returns to normal operation once the package is corrected
SorterB returns to normal operation once the package is corrected
Conveyor must not stop for more than 10 seconds

wrong_samples.constraint: SorterA returns to normal operation once the package is corrected
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A drone surveys crop zones while a rover collects soil samples. Every zone must be inspected at least once. The rover begins sampling only after the drone finishes the zone. If communication is lost, both must halt.

constraints: Drone inspects all zones eventually
Rover samples only after drone finishes scanning zone
AgriDrone and SoilRover halt if communication lost

wrong_samples.constraint: AgriDrone and SoilRover halt if communication lost
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A medication robot delivers supplies across hospital floors. If elevator is busy, it waits; otherwise it proceeds. Every request should eventually be fulfilled, and the robot should always remain within safe areas.

constraints: MediBot waits if elevator busy
Each delivery request eventually fulfilled
MediBot never leaves safe areas

wrong_samples.constraint: MediBot waits if elevator busy
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: An external repair drone fixes solar panels, while an inspection bot verifies alignment. at some point repair drone have to to reach a safe shutdown state. If misalignment persists for over 60 seconds we must switch inspection bot to emergency stop.

constraints: At some point RepairDrone have to reach a safe shutdown state
If misalignment persists for 60 seconds,InspectBot apply emergency stop triggers

wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: Three AMRs operate at a dock. At any time, at least one must be charging. Eventually, they can operate again after recharging.

constraints: At least one AMR must always be charging
DockAMR1 can operate after DockAMR1 has recharged
DockAMR2 can operate after DockAMR2 has recharged
DockAMR3 can operate after DockAMR3 has recharged

wrong_samples.constraint: At least one AMR must always be charging
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A crane unloads containers onto AGV1 and AGV2. A drone supervises from above, and a forklift transports the containers to storage. Both AGVs wait until crane signals unloading complete. Forklift starts after any AGV reaches the transfer zone. Drone must maintain 20 m distance from crane at all times. Eventually, all containers must be in storage.

constraints: AGV1 and AGV2 wait until CraneBot signals unloading complete
Forklift starts only after at least one AGV reaches transfer zone
DroneSupervisor maintains at least 20 m distance from CraneBot
Eventually all containers reach storage area

wrong_samples.constraint: AGV1 and AGV2 wait until CraneBot signals unloading complete
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: Two cranes lift beams, a welder seals them, a drone monitors progress, and two delivery AMRs supply materials. Welding can begin only after both cranes finish lifting. Drone must remain within 50 m radius of cranes. DeliveryAMRs must alternate: while one delivers, the other waits. Eventually, all beams are welded and drone reports completion.

constraints: WelderBot starts only after CraneA and CraneB finish lifting
MonitorDrone must remain within 50 m radius of both cranes
DeliveryAMR1 and DeliveryAMR2 alternate deliveries (mutual exclusion)
Eventually all beams welded and MonitorDrone reports completion

wrong_samples.constraint: MonitorDrone must remain within 50 m radius of both cranes
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A drone maps the disaster area, two search robots locate survivors, a medical robot delivers aid, and a transport AMR carries victims to safety. SearchRobots must not enter overlapping zones. MedicalBot waits for confirmation from at least one SearchRobot before starting aid delivery. TransportAMR operates only after MedicalBot finishes. It must always be possible to reach a state where all survivors are rescued.

constraints: SearchBot1 and SearchBot2 must not enter overlapping zones
MedicalBot delivers aid only after confirmation from at least one SearchBot
TransportAMR starts only after MedicalBot finishes aid delivery
Always possible to reach a state where all survivors are rescued

wrong_samples.constraint: MedicalBot delivers aid only after confirmation from at least one SearchBot
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: An indoor inspection drone autonomously navigates a multi-floor factory. It must spend no more than 120 seconds in each section. If temperature exceeds 60°C, the drone activates thermal protection and skips the current section. In case of lost localization, it switches to mapping mode until position is reacquired. When all sections are inspected, it must land at the maintenance dock and upload sensor logs. It is always possible to reach a safe state where the drone is landed.

constraints: InspectDrone spends ≤ 120 s per section
If temperature exceeds 60°C, InspectDrone must activate thermal protection
InspectDrone skips section when temperature > 60°C
InspectDrone switches to mapping mode if localization lost
InspectDrone lands at maintenance dock after all sections inspected
InspectDrone uploads sensor logs after landing
Always possible to reach safe landed state

wrong_samples.constraint: Always possible to reach safe landed state
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A mobile manipulator robot performs order picking in a warehouse. It identifies shelves via QR codes and must verify the item before grasping. If weight exceeds its maximum capacity, it must abort the pick and notify the supervisor. When humans are detected within 2 meters, speed is reduced to 0.3 m/s. If obstacle blocking persists longer than 10 seconds, the robot must request assistance. Eventually, all orders should be completed and reported.

constraints: PickerBot verifies item via QR before grasping
PickerBot aborts pick  when load exceeds limit
when load exceeds limit PickerBot notifies supervisor
PickerBot reduces speed to 0.3 m/s when human < 2 m
PickerBot requests help if obstacle persists > 10 s
Eventually all orders completed
Eventually all orders reported

wrong_samples.constraint: PickerBot aborts pick  when load exceeds limit
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: An autonomous rover explores a volcanic terrain. It collects temperature and seismic data every 200 meters and must not approach closer than 5 meters to lava zones. If terrain slope exceeds 30°, it activates stabilizers before proceeding. If a data packet fails transmission three times, it must log the failure and continue. Eventually, all checkpoints must be reached and at least 90% of data successfully transmitted.

constraints: ExploroRover collects data every 200 m
ExploroRover avoids lava zones by ≥ 5 m
ExploroRover activates stabilizers when slope > 30°
ExploroRover logs transmission failure after 3 retries
ExploroRover fails transmission three times, ExploroRover continues.
ExploroRover must eventually reach all checkpoints.
Eventually ≥ 90% data must be successfully transmitted

wrong_samples.constraint: ExploroRover collects data every 200 m
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A maintenance bot operates in a refrigerated warehouse maintaining conveyor motors. It must warm up sensors for 30 seconds before measurements. If temperature drops below −25°C, it enters standby mode until heating pads raise it above −15°C. The robot performs vibration analysis for each motor and logs anomalies. It is always possible for the bot to recover from standby to active operation.

constraints: FrostBot warms sensors for 30 s before measurements
FrostBot enters standby when temperature < −25°C
FrostBot resumes when temperature > −15°C
FrostBot performs vibration analysis for each motor
FrostBot logs anomalies for each motor
Always possible to recover from standby to active

wrong_samples.constraint: FrostBot warms sensors for 30 s before measurements
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: A harbor inspection drone flies along dock sections capturing video of hulls and cranes. It must maintain altitude between 8 and 20 meters and avoid restricted air corridors. If strong magnetic interference is detected, it must ascend above 25 meters until interference clears. The drone uploads each section’s footage before starting the next and must always return to base at the end of its patrol.

HarborDrone avoids restricted corridors

HarborDrone uploads footage before moving to next section
Always returns to base at end of patrol

wrong_samples.constraint: Always returns to base at end of patrol
wrong_samples.label: wrong

wrong_samples.scenario_prompt: An autonomous delivery robot transports medication trays across hospital wards. It must check elevator availability before entering and disinfect its tray every 15 minutes of operation. When any emergency alarm is active, it must stop and move to a safe corridor. If communication with control is lost, it stores all pending deliveries locally. All deliveries must eventually be completed.

constraints: MediRover checks elevator availability before entering
MediRover disinfects tray every 15 minutes
MediRover stops  when emergency alarm active
MediRover is stopped and emergency alarm is active, MediRover has to move to safe corridor
MediRover stores pending deliveries locally if comm lost
Eventually all deliveries completed

wrong_samples.constraint: MediRover stops  when emergency alarm active
wrong_samples.label: wrong
